architecture/api-architecture.title: API Architecture
architecture/api-architecture.description: The NestJS API (apps/api) follows a pragmatic DDD approach with single-responsibility services, event-driven async processing, and structured error handling.

architecture/backend-packages.title: Backend Packages
architecture/backend-packages.description: The backend is split into reusable packages under packages/backend/. Each follows a pluggable service pattern: an abstract class defines the interface, concrete implementations provide behavior, and a @Global DynamicModule with a factory reads config to select the active implementation at runtime.

architecture/frontend-architecture.title: Frontend Architecture
architecture/frontend-architecture.description: The packages/frontend package implements a clean architecture pattern shared between web and mobile.

architecture/overview.title: Architecture Overview
architecture/overview.description: Flama follows a monorepo architecture with clear separation of concerns.

deployment/tier-2-production.title: Tier 2: Production Deployment (~€15-35/mo)
deployment/tier-2-production.description: For production applications with Kubernetes on Hetzner.

intro.title: Flama
intro.description: Full-stack monorepo boilerplate for bootstrapping applications fast.
